text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Well, I placed. I guess my hard work did pay off, but...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Is it too ambitious of me to have wanted first? Be
honest, what do you think about today's result?
choice_data_list: Placing is an impressive feat too!
Placing is an impressive feat too!
Let's make sure we get first place next time!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Is it too ambitious of me to have wanted first? Be
honest, what do you think about today's result?
choice_data_list: Placing is an impressive feat too!
Placing is an impressive feat too!
Let's make sure we get first place next time!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Are you being serious? I'm kinda pissed I didn't
win, not gonna lie.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Haha, you sound way too confident, but I'm glad
you have so much trust in me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You're right, the way I ran today made me feel
like I can actually do better.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Okay! Now I'm pumped. I'll get it next time!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But I'm relieved. You think I can do better too.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I can't be satisfied with just placing. I want
everyone to see me as a strong runner.
choice_data_list:
Then we'd better get straight back to
practicing!

Then we'd better get straight back to
practicing!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
There's that mad enthusiasm again... But you're
right. I'm going to keep on, no matter how
grueling the fight.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Soon enough, I'll be an even better version of
myself!
